title: staff — PHP attribute contracts
description: Two class-level attributes for listener discovery. `#[AsStaffListener]` subscribes to Staff lifecycle events (hire / offboard / branch-change / promote / suspend / compensation-changed). `#[AsCoachListener]` subscribes to Coach lifecycle events (create / sport-change / certification / status / availability). The Coach listener attribute is distinct because the Coach entity has its own cadence + priority conventions (coach ratings are aggregated nightly; certification expiries are compliance-critical; sport-changes invalidate directory caches).

attributes.name: AsStaffListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to Staff lifecycle events (StaffHired / StaffUpdated / StaffPositionChanged / StaffDepartmentChanged / StaffBranchChanged / StaffPromotedToBranchManager / StaffDemotedFromBranchManager / StaffPutOnLeave / StaffReturnedFromLeave / StaffSuspended / StaffReinstated / StaffOffboardingStarted / StaffOffboarded / StaffReactivated). NOTE: CompensationChanged is NOT included in the default event set — subscribers to compensation events must opt in explicitly via `events: ['CompensationChanged']` because that event routes on the compensation-audit queue and has private-tier payload.

params.name: events
params.description: Array of event short names (`StaffHired`, `StaffOffboarded`, ...). Empty = subscribe to every `Stackra\Staff\Events\Staff*` event EXCEPT CompensationChanged (which requires explicit opt-in). Names resolve against events.json at boot; typos abort boot with a discovery error.

params.name: queue
params.description: Optional queue override. Falls back to the event's default queue. Cascade listeners typically override to `staff`.

params.name: priority
params.description: Handler ordering within a single event. Lower runs first. Cascade listeners (CascadeCoachStatusOnStaffOffboarding) declare priority 40 so they run before notification listeners.

attributes.name: AsCoachListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to Coach lifecycle events (CoachCreated / CoachSportChanged / CoachCertificationAdded / CoachCertificationExpired / CoachCertificationRemoved / CoachRatingUpdated / CoachStatusChanged / CoachAvailabilityChanged).
